narrative:
Norwood City has 13,301 registered voters, with 66.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
